offer: For insurance underwriters processing 10-50 claims/month, delayed fraud detection causes increased financial losses. We provide a fraud detection service instead of manual review of claims.
problem: Identifying fraudulent claims patterns in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance underwriters
Indie Hackers discussions on similar tools
DM outreach to insurance underwriters with demo video
Engage in community forums for insurance workflows
try_it: Let users try manual claim flagging and alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
